profile:
# GrowthX AI Engineering Team

## Who We Are
Engineering team at GrowthX AI — building end-to-end growth engines with expert-guided AI workflows. We are also the creators of Output.ai, an open-source AI workflow framework built on TypeScript and Temporal.

## What We Build
- AI workflow orchestration framework (TypeScript, Temporal)
- Custom integrations and internal tools for marketing automation at scale
- LLM-powered pipelines for content, distribution, and conversion

## Tech Stack
- TypeScript, React, Next.js, shadcn/ui, Node.js, Python
- Ruby on Rails (legacy systems)
- Distributed systems, Temporal, workflow orchestration
- LLMs, RAG, prompt engineering, eval systems

## What We Care About
- Advanced AI: reasoning models, agent architectures, multi-agent systems, tool use, planning
- AI infrastructure: model serving, inference optimization, context windows, structured output
- AI engineering practices: evals, guardrails, observability, prompt optimization
- Workflow orchestration and durable execution
- Open source AI tooling and frameworks
- Developer tools and DX
- Marketing and sales tech: GTM strategy, growth engineering, AI-powered sales tools, outbound automation
- Frontend: React ecosystem, Next.js, component libraries, UI/UX patterns

## Watch Topics (always surface these)
- Temporal news or releases
- AI agent frameworks (LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen, OpenAI Agents SDK, etc.)
- New reasoning or frontier models (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Meta, Mistral)
- AI workflow orchestration
- Open source AI infrastructure (vLLM, Ollama, etc.)
- AI coding tools and assistants
- Next.js and React major updates
- TypeScript ecosystem news
